label: Snowflake
description: Connect to your Snowflake cloud data warehouse to run queries and access your data.

form.title: Connect Snowflake
form.subtitle: Enter your Snowflake account credentials to start querying your data warehouse.

methods.label: Username & Password
methods.description: Authenticate with your Snowflake username, password, and account identifier. The simplest path — no extra setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with Username & Password

You'll need your Snowflake account identifier, username, and password. Optional settings let you pin a default warehouse, database, schema, and role.

### Find your account identifier

1. Log in to the [Snowflake web UI](https://app.snowflake.com).
2. Click your name in the bottom-left corner → **Account** panel.
3. Your account identifier appears under **Account** — it looks like `abc12345.us-east-1` (organization-style) or just `abc12345` for older accounts.
4. Copy the identifier exactly as shown — this is what goes in the **Account Identifier** field below.

### Recommended optional settings

- **Warehouse** — the virtual warehouse to use for queries (e.g. `COMPUTE_WH`). If left blank, Snowflake uses the default for your role.
- **Database** — default database context (e.g. `MY_DB`).
- **Schema** — default schema within that database (e.g. `PUBLIC`).
- **Role** — the Snowflake role to assume (e.g. `SYSADMIN`). Defaults to your user's default role if omitted.

### Notes

- Account identifiers are case-insensitive but must not include `.snowflakecomputing.com` — Anton appends that suffix automatically.
- If your org uses Okta or another SSO provider as the primary login, you may need to create a separate Snowflake-native user with a password under **Admin → Users & Roles → Users → + User**.
- Key-pair authentication is not yet supported. Request it via feedback if you need it.

fields.name: account_identifier
fields.label: Account Identifier
fields.description: Found in Snowflake UI → your name (bottom-left) → Account. Do not include .snowflakecomputing.com.

fields.name: username
fields.label: Username
fields.description: Your Snowflake login username (not your email, unless they match).

fields.name: password
fields.label: Password
fields.description: Your Snowflake account password. Stored encrypted locally.

fields.name: warehouse
fields.label: Default Warehouse
fields.description: Virtual warehouse used for query execution. Leave blank to use your user's default.

fields.name: database
fields.label: Default Database
fields.description: Default database context for queries. Can be overridden per-query.

fields.name: schema
fields.label: Default Schema
fields.description: Default schema within the database. Can be overridden per-query.

fields.name: role
fields.label: Role
fields.description: Snowflake role to assume. Defaults to your user's default role if left blank.
